title: Origins: Block Staff
description: A powerful weapon in the wrong hands.
body:
For this to work, you need the Origins Mod.
You can choose a different character to become your **origin** to experience Minecraft.

This Origin is Coded in 1.10.0 of origin, so for other versions or forge version, there may having bugs that not expected.

You also need the [Resource pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/block-staffs).

A powerful weapon in the wrong hands.

🟨Block Staff `20250616`
 - You get one `Block Staff` when Selected. Everyone can craft the `Block Staff`, but only you can use the True Power of it.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c5d49fe9ac45b0b9854e95943dd1bdfbdce3a0d7.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69b72cb3f2447b505e2f044bd229866855d13086.png)

🟨Block Forge `20250616`
 - When you holding `Block Staff` and `Block`, Using `Secondary Active` will forge the `Block` to the `Block Staff`, `Block Staff` will switch to relative power.

🔵Block Staff Enchant `20250618`
 - Enchanted Block Staff have faster cooldown.

🟨Random Color Hat `20240116`
 - When Selecting this origin, you will receive a color hat, that's different from any other players.

<details>
<summary>New Blocks Power list(11.1+)</summary>
  
- `command_block(force_choke, force_shield), ender_portal_frame, redstone_lamp, bamboo_block, sponge, lucky_block, oak_planks, cobblestone, spruce_planks, mossy_cobblestone, birch_planks, stone, cherry_planks`
  
  - removed

- `iron_block, gold_block, diamond_block, netherite_block`
  
  - removed active power.
  
- `piglin_head`
  
  - removed passive power
  
- Iron Block

  - You deal 30% Extra damage when [Block Staff] in mainhand.

- Gold Block

  - You receive 3 Extra luck when [Block Staff] in mainhand.

- Diamond Block

  - You deal 60% Extra Damage when [Block Staff] in mainhand.

- Netherite Block

  - You deal 80% Extra Damage when [Block Staff] in mainhand.

- Redstone Block

  - You move 30% faster when there have redstone block around, Using [Primary_active], Blocks around you will be powered toggled. (Blocks that have [powered] block state will be include, e.g. lever)

- Lapis Block

   - You gain 60% more xp amount and no fall damage, Using [Primary_active], You receive levitation for 3 seconds.

- Emerald Block

   - You get double amplifier of Hero of the Village Effect when recieve it, Using [Primary_active], You get Hero of the Village amplifier 1 for 60 seconds.

- Furnace Staff

   - Using [Primary_active], You can smelt items on your main hand.

- Chest Staff

   - Using [Primary_active], You will look at the nearest chest.

- Crafting table Staff

   - Using [Primary_active], You can open a crafting table GUI.

- Enchanting Table Staff
 
   - You will recieve 1 xp point per attack when [Block Staff] in mainhand. Using [Primary_active], You will enchant your item with random relative enchantments, Cost 5 xp levels.

- Anvil Staff
 
   - You deal 80% Extra Damage when [Block Staff] in mainhand, but you recieve 80% less movement speed, and 80% less attack speed. Cant jump and sink in water. Using [Primary_active], You will repair 30% of your mainhand item, cost 10 xp levels.

- GrindStone Staff 

   - You mine faster and able to harvest all block when [Block Staff] in mainhand. Using [Primary_active], Target Mainhand item will be droped in randomly direction.

- Command Block Staff
  - You have three different on hit attack mode cycle. Attack with Impulse mode will hold target on air. Holding Repeat mode will recieve Strength and Speed to self. Attack With Chain mode will apply Weakness and Slow to target. Your attack when having Command block Staff will Cycle the mode. Using [save/loadToolbarActivator] when [Block Staff] in mainhand, You can switch between commands. Using [Primary_activate] to activate them.
    - /function blockstaff:levitate - You can Levitate with the command block staff.
    - /function blockstaff:flame_arrow_rain - Rain Arrows and small fireball from the sky on where your looking.
    - /function blockstaff:thunder_strike - Strike Lightning on where your looking.
    - /function blockstaff:break_block - break block in front( Item will drop, can break bedrock).

![Knowledge Book recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bfbada360dd4d41b30fb926ec48f44cc1ff15164.png)
![Command Block Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/24b230282a6d213c158135cab50308ca3788af6e.png)

- Hay Block
  - You take less fall damage, Using [Primary_active], You recieve one bread.
 
- Ender Chest
  - Using [Primary_active], Open up a Ender chest.

- Chorus Flower
  - Using [Primary_active], You will randomly teleport.

- Obsidian Staff:
  - Your attack will teleport target far away, as long as theres room for it.

- Dragon Head:
  - When you get damage, you will gain stack, when in full stack, you will knockback entity around. When there have end crystal nearby, you will gain saturation. Using [Primary_active] when [Block Staff] in mainhand, You can shoot Dragon Fireball.

- Cake: 
  - Saturation and hunger you gain from food will doubled. Using [Primary_active] heal entity around, and set inlove if available.
  
- Pink Wool:
  - When [Block Staff] in mainhand, your Melee attack will increase knockback, but heal target and deal 1% damage.
  
- Conduit: 
  - Using [Primary_active] when [Block Staff] in mainhand with Coral Blocks at other hand, you forge your coral blocks to your staff. You recieve Water breathing, different Coral BLocks have different passive when in water. Brain: Luck, Tube: Haste, Fire: Strength, Horn: Dolphins Grace, Bubble: Absorption.

- Monster Spawner:
  - If you killed non-player target when [Block Staff] in mainhand, it will store the soul of target to a sheep spawn egg. You can spawn them back out but with 1 Health.

![Spawner Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb5cf4d08e077b4a4e4cbfc08596efa06608c546.png)
![Knowledge Book recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c784efe051f9a2e76bf006aa6bb8958fbc39021.png)

- Wither Skeleton Skull
  - You attack apply wither and weakness and immune to wither when [Block Staff] in mainhand. Using [Primary_Active], you can shoot wither skull.

- Zombie Head
  - You receive strength and hunger every attack when [Block Staff] in mainhand, strength level will scale with missing hunger, hunger level will scale with current hunger. maximum with 3.

- Piglin Head
  - Using [Primary_Active] when having gold ingot, you can trade with yourself like trading with piglin.

- Skeleton Skull
  - Your attack will apply mark to target for 10 seconds. You will shoot a arrow automatically every 4 seconds to target around. Arrow hit will apply mark too.

- Creeper Head
  - When You will die, you will self explode with chances to explode stronger. Wont break blocks. 

- TNT
  - Using [Primary_Active], you can shoot TNT.

- Brewing Stand
  - When holding [Block Staff], You will turn all effect to a splash potion.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Old Blocks Power list</summary>

- Iron Block

  - You deal 30% Extra damage, Using [Primary_active], Next three damage you receive will reduce 30%.

- Gold Block

  - Your looting enchants and fortune enchants always have +5 levels( even you dont have the enchants.), Using [Primary_active], Your fortune enchants increase extra +5 levels on next three mines.

- Diamond Block

  - You deal 60% Extra Damage, Using [Primary_active], You deal +2 more damage for next three attack.

- Netherite Block

  - You deal 80% Extra Damage, Using [Primary_active], Your Block all damage for next 0.75 seconds.

- Redstone Block

  - You move 30% faster when there have redstone block around, Using [Primary_active], Blocks around you will be powered toggled. (Blocks that have [powered] block state will be include, e.g. lever)

- Lapis Block

   - You gain 60% more xp amount and you will fall slowly and no fall damage, Using [Primary_active], You receive levitation for 3 seconds.

- Emerald Block

   - You get double amplifier of Hero of the Village Effect when recieve it, Using [Primary_active], You get Hero of the Village amplifier 1 for 60 seconds.

- Furnace Staff

   - Using [Primary_active], You can smelt items on your main hand.

- Chest Staff

   - Using [Primary_active], You can open a chest( Back Pack).

- Crafting table Staff

   - Using [Primary_active], you can open a crafting table GUI.

- Enchanting Table Staff
 
   - You will recieve 1 xp point per attack. Using [Primary_active], You will enchant your item with random 3 item, if having same enchant, it will stack with maximum level 10, Cost 3 xp levels.

- Anvil Staff
 
   - You deal 80% Extra Damage, but you recieve 80% less movement speed, and 80% less attack speed. Cant jump and sink in water. Using [Primary_active], You will repair 30% of your item, cost 3 xp levels.

- GrindStone Staff 

   - You recieve Haste 1 when mining, Haste Level you recieve will increase base on xp level you have (+1 Haste per 10 Level). Using [Primary_active], Target Mainhand item will be droped in randomly direction.

- Oak Planks Staff

   - This is a building block staff. You cant break and place block, Instead you will place Oak Planks when rightclick, and break Oak Planks with leftclick. Range will be determinate with slected slot. Using [Primary_active], You can switch between Different varient of Oak Planks blocks to place and break.
 
- Cobblestone Staff

  - This is a building block staff. You cant break and place block, Instead you will place Cobblestone when rightclick, and break Cobblestone with leftclick. Range will be determinate with slected slot. Using [Primary_active], You can switch between Different varient of Cobblestone blocks to place and break.

- Command Block Staff
  - You have three different on hit attack mode cycle. Attack with Impulse mode will hold target on air. Holding Repeat mode will recieve Strength and Speed to self. Attack With Chain mode will apply Weakness and Slow to target. Your attack when having Command block Staff will Cycle the mode. Using [save/loadToolbarActivator], You can switch between commands. Using [Primary_activate] to activate them.
    - /function blockstaff:Levitate - You can Levitate with the command block staff.
    - /function blockstaff:Force_Choke - You may grab target you looking at.
    - /function blockstaff:Flame_Arrow_Rain - Rain Arrows and small fireball from the sky on where your looking.
    - /function blockstaff:Force_Shield - Push away entities around constantly.
    - /function blockstaff:Thunder_Strike - Strike Lightning on where your looking.
    - /setblock ^ ^ ^1 air destroy - setblock in front to air( Item will drop, can break bedrock).

![Knowledge Book recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bfbada360dd4d41b30fb926ec48f44cc1ff15164.png)
![Command Block Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/24b230282a6d213c158135cab50308ca3788af6e.png)

- Spruce Planks Staff
  - This is a building block staff. You cant break and place block, Instead you will place Spruce Planks when rightclick, and break Spruce Planks with leftclick. Range will be determinate with slected slot. Using [Primary_active], You can switch between Different varient of Spruce Planks blocks to place and break.

 - Mossy Cobblestone Staff
    - This is a building block staff. You cant break and place block, Instead you will place Mossy Cobblestone when rightclick, and break Mossy Cobblestone with leftclick. Range will be determinate with slected slot. Using [Primary_active], You can switch between Different varient of Mossy Cobblestone blocks to place and break.

 - Hay Block
   - You take less fall damage, Using [Primary_active], You recieve one bread.
 
 - Ender Chest
   - Using [Primary_active], Open up a Ender chest.

 - Chorus Flower
   - Using [Primary_active], Next three damage you recieve will teleport you.
  
- Ender Portal Frame Staff: 
  - You cant place block, instead, you will place down different portal according to mode, cant place if there have a Portal nearby, Crouch rightclick will remove all Portal you placed. Any mobs go in will be teleported to another. Using [Primary_active], You can switch between Portal O and Portal T.

![Knowledge Book recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bfbada360dd4d41b30fb926ec48f44cc1ff15164.png)
![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0801565cc30a6beed2fd89da870dbf65780011d9.png)

- Obsidian Staff:
  - Your attack/shoot will teleport target far away, as long as theres room for it.
  
- Chorus Flower:
  - Using [Primary_active], Next three damage you recieve will teleport you.
  
- Birch Planks:
  - This is a building block staff. You cant break and place block, Instead you will place Birch Planks when rightclick, and break Birch Planks with leftclick. Range will be determinate with slected slot. Using [Primary_active], You can switch between Different varient of Birch Planks blocks to place and break.
  
- Stone Bricks:
  - This is a building block staff. You cant break and place block, Instead you will place Stone Bricks when rightclick, and break Stone Bricks with leftclick. Range will be determinate with slected slot. Using [Primary_active], You can switch between Different varient of Stone Bricks blocks to place and break.

- Redstone Lamp: 
  - You have light around you when holding the staff. Using [Primary_active], You can place a glowy light source, place again in same place can make the light stronger, you can remove by puching it.

- Bamboo Block:
  - Use [Primary_active] to shoot a Bamboomerang.
  
- Dragon Head:
  - When you get damage, you will gain stack according the damage, when in full stack, you will knockback entity around. When there have end crystal nearby, you will gain saturation, Using [Primary_active], You can shoot Dragon Fireball.

- Cake: 
  - Saturation and hunger you gain from food will doubled. Using [Primary_active] to shoot Cake, it will heal apply slowness and blindness, but heal for one health.
  
- Pink Wool:
  - Your Melee attack will increase knockback, but heal target. You wont take fall damage
  
- Cherry Planks:
  - This is a building block staff. You cant break and place block, Instead you will place Cherry Planks when rightclick, and break Cherry Planks with leftclick. Range will be determinate with slected slot. Using [Primary_active], You can switch between Different varient of Cherry Planks blocks to place and break.

- Conduit: 
  - Using [Primary_active], You will open up a GUI for putting Coral Blocks in it, Different Coral BLocks have different passive. Brain: Luck, Tube: Haste, Fire: Strength, Horn: Dolphins Grace, Bubble: Absorption.

- Sponge:
  - Water around you will be turn to air.

- Monster Spawner:
  - If you killed non-player target, it will store the soul of target to a sheep spawn egg. You can spawn them back out but with 1 Health.
  - ![Spawner Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb5cf4d08e077b4a4e4cbfc08596efa06608c546.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c784efe051f9a2e76bf006aa6bb8958fbc39021.png)

- Wither Skeleton Skull
  - You attack apply wither and weakness, and you immune to wither. Using [Primary_Active], you can shoot wither skull.
- Zombie Head
  - You receive strength and hunger every attack, strength level will scale with missing hunger, hunger level will scale with current hunger. maximum with 3.
- Piglin Head
  - You recieve strenght every attack, level will scale with xp level, strength level maximum is 6. Using [Primary_Active], you can trade with yourself like trading with piglin.
- Skeleton Skull
  - Your attack will apply mark to target for 10 seconds. You will shoot a arrow automatically every 4 seconds to target around. Arrow hit will apply mark too.
- Creeper Head
  - When You will die, you will self explode with chances to explode stronger. Wont break blocks. 
- Lucky Block:
  - You can place a Lucky Block in front. Mining lucky block can stack up, every 10 stack increase luck level. You recieve luck every 10 seconds.

</details>

So the current plan:
- `1.0 `**Ore** Update (Done)
- `2.0 `**Work Stations** Update (Done)
- `3.0 `**Enchanting** Update (Done)
- `3.1 `**1.19.x** Update (Done)
- `4.0 `**Build** Update (Done)
- `4.1 `**Represent** Update (Done)
- `5.0 `**Command Block** Update (Done)
- `6.0 `**Ender** Update (Done)
- `7.0 `**Chinese new year** Update (Done)
- `8.0 `**Love & Hugs** Update (Done)
- `9.0 `**Aquatic** Update (Done)
- `10.0`**Monster** Update (Done)
- `11.0`**Command Block** Update Part 2 (Done)
- `DLC `**Lucky Block** Update (Done)
- `12.0`**Suggestions** Update (Done)
